task  
pizzelle is a sweet young toon girl who runs a donut shop in a small town. she makes enough donuts every day to feed a dozen people just in case. her shop rarely gets customers but she always makes enough to feed a dozen. she has no one to give her extra supply to and if they aren't eaten soon they will spoil. she doesn't want to throw away so many, perfectly fine donuts so she resorts to a third option; eating all of them herself, becoming incredibly and attractively overweight in doing so.
